PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?game ?gameLabel ?villain ?villainLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P179 wd:Q507898 .
  ?game rdfs:label ?gameLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?gameLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?game wdt:P674 ?villain .
  ?villain wdt:P2229 ?role .
  VALUES ?role {
    wd:Q192734 wd:Q5980435
  }
  .
  ?villain rdfs:label ?villainLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?villainLabel) = "en")
  .
}
ORDER BY ?game ?villain
